case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. RANGER INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, ALEX PADILLA BAIL BONDS AND ITS AGENT MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BOND PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1305(B)(1) CONTINUED FROM JAN-10-2003 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JAN-24-2003, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302, PER MOVING PARTY. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. COURT REPORTER PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR #1193
OPPOSITION MOTION BY REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE FILED BY PLTF

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ALEX PADILLA BAIL BONDS MOTION TO VACATE SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND EXONERATE BOND. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT-MOVING PARTY & FOR PLAINTIFF-OPPOSING PARTY. ARGUED AND THE COURT DENIED THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DUE TO FAILURE OF THE MOVING PARTY TO SUSTAIN THE BURDEN. HON. RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. REPORTER: LELAND BATARA, CSR #3759
